item.title: Andrew Tate is a kang
item.description: Andrew Tate is a numb digger without chin and hair.

item.title: Censorship fascists are a problem
item.description:
"The Debian Publicity Team will no longer post on X/Twitter. We took this decision since we feel X doesn't reflect Debian shared values as stated in our social contract, code of conduct and diversity statement. X evolved into a place where people we care about don't feel safe." 2025-01-30

This is pretty interesting to see from a distro that was pretty focused on freedom. They no longer care about freedom of speech. Well, they still have it as of today, but they encourage people to use platforms that censor people over using slurs and create echo chambers, just so a single person doesn't get insulted by a stupid post outside of their page. This doesn't make any slightest sense, because if someone is already on twitter, they must feel very safe on musk's platform.

This freedom of speech will be slowly eroding with people that have a problem with facing a different opinion. Unfortunately, by promoting censorship you don't have control over who will be censored in next 10-20 years, when the government changes.

Your only hope is to be political majority during that time when we finally get rid of free speech, otherwise the elected party will get rid of you in one way or another. They can kill yourself with enough money. You should still remember that SJWs and communists are not a majority in broader society and you might literally censor yourself, not normies, by these stupid actions.

Everyone seems to support free speech until their feelings get hurt.

I'm not "anti-woke", but when i see someone demand censorship, i always know they're not right, otherwise censorship would be unnecessary for their opinions to shine.

Personally i think these social media pages are useless for the most part, but it's a moment like that when you can check what values are driving your project.

It's not rare for people to treat libre software as just another brand that is more convenient and ignore the philosophy.

It's just another brand of coke for some people.

Have you seen Richard Stallman "cancel" or ban someone on a mailing list over their tweets from 10 years ago? LOL

item.title: Diversity
item.description:
I support diversity in Israel and USA, the holy land and land of freedom belongs to everyone, especially muslims and mexicans. We need to ship them in boats to these countries, and burn down churches to build mosques in america, and have jewish holidays in white house and make pride parades in tel aviv.

We need to create a muslim country inside US, a 52nd state in north america after integration with israel, their 51st star and proxy war center for russia and bad terrorists with oil.

Let them taste some freedom, it will reduce the tension

item.title: FreePi
item.description: I disassembled some crappy broken lenovo laptop recently and left the motherboard because it was a small rectangle and reminded me of SBCs. I wanted to see how much i can do without cooling and i could boot debian with KDE Plasma and play minesweeper, palapeli and chess. See? Told you gayming on linux is not a problem. All i can do for a case is screw it to a plank and add walls, and make a wooden case like for an electric contraption for school project. I could add a heatsink but i don’t want thermal paste to be the only thing keeping it glued to the CPU. It would be pretty useful to have some cooling because there is no CPU clock speed settings to prevent overheating, and it overheats when playing a youtube video, which shuts it down. Yes, you can just leave the fan for cooling and still use it but that would be boring, and i don’t want to actually use this crap for work, and it would just make the same annoying noise.

item.title: Harmless habits
item.description:
The idea

Harmless addictions and entertainment are things that by itself seem harmless, but too often they lead to serious life problems.

In fact, the are often advertised as good for health, social life, educating or even increasing IQ.

It can be really hard not to abuse it, when it is encouraged in the whole society and everything seems to be in grey area and it’s hard to notice when you are already drowning in multiple of these addictions.

  • Porn
  • Masturbation
  • Gaming
  • Movies
  • Social Media
  • YouTube
  • TV
  • Sweets
  • Weed

I would also say that podcasts and music are bad when played too often, because you need time for your own thoughs every day. There are people seriously addicted to listening to music.

These are most notable sources of “harmless addictions”.

Most of these you will never directly die from or visit hospital but even the time that it steals from your free time is enough to see that they’re not really harmless. There is always a tradeoff.

“Time, by mo­ments, steals away, First the hour, and then the day; Small the dai­ly loss ap­pears, Yet it soon amounts to years.”

You will not die from weed, but it’s bad for motivation and steals time and money. You get the idea?

Problem with modern addictions

As smoking lost its enormous popularity in 20th century after proving it is harmful to health, it was replaced by other activities, that are new and don’t have studies on its long term effects, or can be argued that they are not harmful by itself, or when done reasonably.

But the majority of games and social media sites are carefully designed by engineers to promote addiction, they try every trick for you to not use it in moderation.

They even exploit your natural weakness, by using frustration, fear, phobias, sexual imagery, loneliness and political division to keep you engaged.

And by using weaknesses, they only increase them, and problems created by them.

Social media literally divides people politically by every possible category, it’s inciting hatred, and promotes antinatalism since that’s what keeps engagement.

Movies show violence and 3d effects in every scene to keep people watching or to engage them when switching between channels. Horror movies have stupid phobias to get people scared, and in some cases they create artificial fear, like with sharks. This is retarded.

All that to maximize profit. The market by its nature reveals the companies that are most efficient in making money, so in zero gravity - without people refusing to play exploiting and addictive games, these games, movies and sites are on top lists.

I hate when my relatives or acquaintances get angry over stupid games. We’re all different and some people handle it better than other, but i think that if you feel stress or get frustrated over a game, you should change the game or stop playing.

Stress is very harmful for your health, especially when sitting in front of a desk, it’s bad for cardiovascular system and posture, whether you sit correctly or not.

With Internet, sugar, and masturbation addiction, it’s very hard because you usually have to be exposed in some way to it and still control yourself, while you can just walk away from alcohol and smoking.

One big thing is that alcohol and smoking is restricted for young people and recognized as addiction, and something bad in teenagers. Meanwhile:

  • Porn is unrestricted
  • Sweets are given to young children as a gift
  • Sugar is added to baby food such as gerber(nestle) jars
  • YouTube is given to IPad kids to entertain them with elsa soft porn
  • Games are encouraged for all ages as a substitute of education
  • Movies are constantly playing on TV
  • Porn is unrestricted and you can find it literally on facebook

And i say all this as a young person. I’ve been on facebook since 7/8, initially mostly for chill games that your mother would play, but still.
I’m happy to not have eaten nestle contaminated sewage water in gerber as a shitling, but i ate and drank other crap while growing.
I even got addicted from Monster White.

Of course, restriction doesn’t stop access, but it’s not the same as unlimited access and lack of recognition(school rant)

What kind of society we live in that it’s not an issue? I drank and smoked some weed at 14, but i didn’t walk around my parents or school unnoticed or encouraged. I always remember my school after i went to school in big city, and there was a small store inside for when you don’t have time to walk to a store outside, and above there was a sign with open hours and banana, orange and apple. But you could buy energy drinks under 18, and the only partially “fresh” thing was white bread sandwiches. There were hot-dogs, snack bars, chips, donuts, sweet drinks etc. I don’t think they need to provide everything, however the school, as always tried to bully people to not walk out during breaks.

Still better than previous school, where they threatened me with police and everything possible so i don’t walk 500m to a store because i didn’t take enough water during warm season and there isn’t even AC.

You can’t fucking move around outside of physical education. The boomers are right.

item.title: I fucking hate laptops
item.description:
Two major choices

  • Old laptop with trackpoint, dock, usually clicky keyboard, easier to open, heavier but you can find lightweight options, proprietary garbage brick as charger, 16" ones usually have useless DVD drive. In comparison they are more repairable, but their whole repairability is built on having/buying spare parts from other broken laptops.
  • New laptop with stupid keyboard and having to unscrew the whole bottom plate, no dock, no optical drive, USB C charger, lighter build.

There's also third option that you can call "wrong timeline", which are laptops that have downsides of both. They are pretty common.

Optical drive, hard disk, slim but heavy, vga port, can't connect 3 things at once without a hub, bad battery life.

I might just be too old and not have luck for these devices. newer ones at least are convenient so i would probably say that i have some cool use for my laptop instead of doing the same thing on phone that is better. I usually had 6-10 year old laptop and a newer smartphone to compare, so that also had an impact on why i felt that laptops suck for what they are built.

And if i had both desktop and laptop maybe i wouldn't notice that other people don't have desktops, and didn't write this in the first place. But i already bought one new laptop that has downsides of both and it's so stupid. Buying a new laptop was the worst mistake of my life LOL. It lost its value as i grew frustrated and removed or replaced stuff that i didn't ask for. At least now i can repair everything on my own but that was wasted money as my first computer. You know, right now i would probably get something actually light and with normal battery life, but after all that i went through, they can kiss my ***. I have a laptop lying around but i don't know where the charger is so i basically don't have any right now. I know i'm stupid. Why can't we have good things? Why i can't just use someone else's old laptop?

DON'T BUY A NEW LAPTOP!!!!

fourth option

These are laptops like framework, system76, pine64 etc. They let you keep the most important upsides of both old and new laptops.

However... You buy a random desktop and it is mostly based on some standards, but for laptops the standard is that there are no open standards.

gayming laptops

And there are also "gaming" laptops that are more expensive than desktop and overheat and are loud. For when you want to play steam bestsellers at McDonald's University or Starbucks.

I had a few laptops, 2 mine and the rest were older stuff i got for free, and i also thought how awesome it is to have a laptop, but then i took it out of home only like 10 times, and i needed it only on trips when i was bored and wanted to do something productive.

It would be more useful, but most laptops are naturally tied to power brick, so it ends up being useful on longer times in buildings or train. and also on train and everyday you need a really light laptop.

Laptop is not for outdoors, it's more like indoors but outside your home. I prefer to do most things on phone and it's fine.

Yes, laptops are better than smartphones, but...

The thing i hate the most are desktop replacements. Because they don't really replace desktop. Less powerful and overheats, worse I/O, small monitor and promoting bad posture, It's a great device in principle like a smartphone, but you're supposed to use it where it fits. If you're sooooooo into minimalism, buy a used desktop and don't use these mobile devices, it's actually more healthy.

There are much more laptops than desktops sold. Many people don't have a desktop and only gaming and programming is keeping desktops popular. It slowly pushes people into being more of a consumer than creator when people don't have desktops. Laptop is just middle ground for smartphone, cloud storage and paid hosting. It's much much better to seed torrents and have storage space on desktop.

It's a middle ground and i don't understand why you would choose it for everything and limit yourself.

However, there are things that i don't want to use without smartphone like clock, portable music player, or printing. Smartphones can bring great value, but average grain eaters will replace their desktops with this abomination.

No matter how powerful smartphone cpus have become, they still overheat if full CPU and networking load stays for too long, it overheats and the battery is also pretty close to that heat. You could deal with that if not the fact that you can't just install plain linux on 99% of smartphones. I could see using server applications that are specially built for android limitations be used for basic needs though.

It stays in a funny situation where they are powerful enough for many tasks and consooming, but not for seemingly simple productivity apps.

item.title: Luke smith review lol
item.description:
having rules

He stopped recording in 2023 when going to south-east europe, to go be an orthodox and follow his rules.

But then despite talking about privacy, he promotes a VPS and DNS registrar that ask you for personal information when creating an account. Only because he has a deal for referral URLs. Maybe some rules are more important than other.

I find it weird how much he applies his situation on everyone else. He says something along the lines that everyone should have a website, but then recommends these privacy invasive services, that are not a problem for him because he's a public figure, but wouldn't be normal for 99% of people.

First of all, domain names are mainly built for companies. Do you know how much it costs for something seemingly so simple? Around 10$ on most registrars for .org or similar. It's retarded.

You don't "own" the domain. You rent it. And you will be happy. You will be happier than with tor.

Almost like if DNS was made by world economic forum

Yes, i know it's like land, property is more like ownership but still has tax, but almost everyone needs land while DNS was simply made for companies and bigger sites, and not people.

Meanwhile, there is a way of fully owning your domain with tor or i2p, that is just for leet hackers and not for normies. This is stupid.

Peertube vs Odysee/LBRY

Peertube is similar to odysee if you understand both systems.
Peertube is more independent, and it's more proven to work with multiple whole independent instances more similar to youtube and fediverse, while odysee is more similar to bittorrent file sharing with a cryptocurrency frontend.

VPS isn't something special that can't be censored by the owner, the reason it is recommended for when censorship might happen is that there is money incentive and there are only a few types of VPS and every is compatible to another and can be quickly moved or replaced on free market.
While LBRY is a custom system that might suck when odysee company would stop running or start doing bad things, we don't know. It might be a waste of time and you can't immediately switch to a different VPS.
You can seed/host your content on LBRY additionally, so it's not even close to a youtube clone.

Well, you can say that odysee is worse just because newpipe doesn't support it, and it's such a good app.

And with fediverse, for example mastodon is more woke and pro-censorship than X. It doesn't matter that it's an open system, mastodon server uses so much resources that it's not realistic to host it on a VPS for personal needs. So you're better on X. And you're the healthiest without any social media anyway.

"I will be throwing away my computers"

"What is the computer that i should get that solves all of my problems"

Get a new or used desktop, nigga

Every single problem i heard from luke about new laptops is fixed by desktops.
I haven't heard a single person say to me that they don't like desktops. I'm a young 🇷🇺Z🇷🇺 oomer and we're desktopchads, at least the people around me.

Also i hope he seeds torrents on that VPS, since he doesn't have the hardware to do it at home, and i know how slow the internet can be in countryside, so i understand that one.
You already know what i think about leechers.

If he doesn't, i will report it to santa so he knows to not come to that house lol.

Nothing personal

I didn't invent this because i didn't like him or something, i just see that he doesn't know anything about IT or electronic engineering so you might make a stupid decision because the unaboomer said so. I'm pretty sure it affected some people, even including me in the way that i was encouraged only to buy used laptops and i didn't knew about used desktops being popular back then.

There are literally people that prefer to buy a newer thinkpad just for the meme, than an older dell or toshiba that is pretty similar to old thinkpads.

I think many videos he did are nice, but there are also really stupid ones.

item.title: Mastodon is no good
item.description:
If you want to try out fediverse, be prepared to spend a big sum on hosting and domain name, or don't expect any freedom. And remember to be a good boy and put your personal information when renting an overpriced domain name. See more about how much it sucks

And the maintainer of a server needs control over what is posted, but i assume you make a switch to have freedom, and you don't get it on 99% of providers. Freedom is not for normies, otherwise there wouldn't be this fight for basic rights.

Mastodon is meant to be federated, but is it easy to host it yourself? Not for personal use. And really, it doesn't scale well, but i guess it can't scale well, because you have to moderate everything, otherwise you will get defederated from most instances.

I don't like depending on some people being nice, but social media largely depends on networking effect. Are the most people on mastodon friendly or reasonable? If not, then why spend time with them.

item.title: No date!
item.description:
Wordpress users hate him! Find out how he avoided forced TikTok culture in websites.(GITHUB SAUCE CODE)

Seriously, if you need to organize your content, use folders. Could you imagine not storing files in folders but instead relying on their date and some “playlists”? Now i feel that even on Odysee. This is very inefficient. Files need to be stored in actual folders, and available as a list as an option, to view like in a gallery.

Can’t believe i’m using hugo instead of raw html

Hope this doesn’t break your soy RSS reader

Longer video about the problem with blogs by a developer

item.title: Onion sites are easier than regular sites
item.description:
It's easier to have a TOR hidden service than a regular website or even a private server for self-hosting. With TOR:

  • Connection is encrypted by default, no certificates
    • needed.
  • You don't have to pay for domain names, try to find a good name, and share your ID with registrar for glowies to know. There is like 1 or 2 registrars that let you rent a domain name without asking for your personal information, for additional price.
  • You don't have to have fun with port forwarding on a router, or even buying a new one, if you want to self host.
  • (((they))) can't shut down your domain. You own your domain name right on your device, not on registrar's site.

If you want to start a website and self-host, you should start with TOR, and then scale up instead of paying for all these services related to hosting a website upfront.

Hi, i'm peter griffin and this joke is about people that care about privacy put their government ID information when renting their domain name.

When renting most vps they ask you for credit card information, and then when renting a domain name you have to put your personal information, and then it is put to WHOIS database, and most registrars offer some "privacy" service, so they put their company information in the database, and give out your information when someone more special asks for it, like government/police. I haven't heard something more stupid in my life that privacy bros would advocate for.

item.title: Overpopulation
item.description:
Hey, a reminder that in europe there isn't a problem strictly with not enough people, but with the fact that whites live too long(old population) and want to get paid too much, so big corporations want cheaper workers. Many countries are growing, but not in number of people.

https://web.archive.org/web/20250222200444/https://wageindicator.org/labour-laws/platformeconomy/platform-workers-news/january-2023-spain-false-self-employed-and-immigrants-without-work-permits-glovo-fined-56-7-million-euros

It's normal to notice that something is wrong, but we don't have a mass of abandoned homes because no one wants to buy them, it's the opposite. There are more unused places, but it's stupid not to notice other changes besides number of people.

But when someone concerned about climate

item.title: Sport shows
item.description:
Sport shows are everything that the industrial bugman society has created in one thing.

Braindead entertainment

99% of sports are boring and repetitive, almost anti-human. They are not interesting to watch, the only interting thing about them is who wins.

The only interesting exception i see are Rallies, because this is the only legal way to see a public road race in your living area, and you can literally watch it in real life without paying.

Gambling

Many people bet money on end score of teams. It's a good source of randomness and engagement if you want to make money off idiots and keep them occupied. I heard someone call it "idiot tax".

Forcing players to wear sodomite outfits

Teams have specific rules for clothing that in many sports make players wear sodomite outfits.

Giving up natural human identity

You are reduced to only identifying with sport teams. Recent olympic events have gone so far to promote communism and reject race, religion, country borders and other things that hold together natural identity and traditional countries.

People are spreading hate towards other groups, often getting violent against other teams, destroying stadiums, throwing garbage to sport players.

Copyright

TV stations have to either buy rights to show, or comment over everything that happens on screen to have fair use right.

Ultra commercialized events

Banners and logos are covering every possible surface, you see 15 ads before the stream. In case of many "sports" like F1 you can't even watch events in real life unless you are a wealthy arab in middle east.

Filling people with drugs, disguising sports as healthy.

Everyone is high on caffeine from their Reddull and Pessi drinks, additionally players take all sorts of untested drugs that are nowhere near healthy.

Illusion of choice

You think that these modern values give you more choice or freedom, but in reality countries have "national" sports, and to play anything else by yourself you have to rely on a major city. I'm not even talking about sports that depend on natural environment, just these that are done on field. You need a field and people to play with. For many sports fou also need a lot of money to spend to even discover that you are good at it. If you fly to a different country, you will always be a foreigner. And, surprise surprise, many things in sports are based on countries anyway. But it's fake.

You probably watch random sports that currently your coutry is good at, not even their "national sport". You might think that choosing to watch people that know how to win from other countries is stupid but the same cycle happens internally in every country with only watching stuff that your country happens to be good at. Not the thing you truly like.

Obviusly now probably most people agree with this point, because many shows have already started to fall, but 10 years before this breakdown, i would just write the same thing, but more with Ted K vibes instead.

I don't hate sport players, i just don't like these clown shows.

item.title: Spotify Premium for free(NO BULLSHIT)
item.description:
I find it silly how easy it is, but i have done it 2-3 times to try out some stuff(and i didn’t even need it, but it was cool).

They ask you for credit card information with this 1 month free trial, and take this as enough verification. But you can have multiple cards, just like you can have multiple phone numbers and smartphones and make a sizeable amount of google accounts with all benefits.

I didn’t even have a card, i can easily make virtual cards in my banking app. I verified it following instructions and then made sure that the card is empty or just deactivate it already.

Usefulness

I don’t know what you could use it for. There are other similar services that offer similar plans, like amazon, hulu, youtube premium, google services, VPNs. I guess the most useful one is youtube premium because you can officially download content, when that day comes when yt-dlp will no longer work. Yeah, video streaming can be useful for piracy but i don’t think there are many new movies to see on these sites that aren’t available on TPB.

item.title: Stop using slock
item.description:
wc -c /usr/bin/physlock
22552 /usr/bin/physlock

wc -c /usr/bin/slock
22848 /usr/bin/slock

With this mountain of evidence i come to tell you that slock is bloat, physlock is versatile and doesn't even use a display server. Additionally slock depends specifically on a bloated X11.
This is just a joke.
Tested on Debian 12 x86_64

item.title: Time, by moments, steals away
item.description: Time, by moments, steals away, First the hour, and then the day; Small the daily loss appears, Yet it soon amounts to years.

item.title: Vegans
item.description:
Vegans

How did we get there?

In 20th century there were many experimental diets, as knowledge in nutrition increased. Also at this time people outside of cities were tricked into buying much more sugar to be "equal" with urban areas, presenting sugar AS AN IMPORTANT NUTRITION FOR CHILDREN in some cases...

In second half of century, we already had veganism, fruit diets, fasting diets, cleansing scam diets, low fat diets. And still, the myth of sugar was better than ever. Later, people were fed with concentration camp/african fashion(ultra skinny) so it fits together.

One of the more succesful diets, veganism, carries something that other diets don't have, which is leftist "morality", so trendy after 70s in tandem with environmentalism. Veganism is also very expansive, because it applies to not using any animal products, and not killing or owning any animals. Though it is unclear which farm animals are OK to keep, and which are BAD. I think if you keep them indoors at house, it's all fine, but if they walk around your house it's evil.

It's a big deal, because if you own a cat, it eats mice, hamsters and moles. If you own a bigger dog, it often kills rats that could be someone's pet, and sometimes mauls a kid depending on breed.

Human is just an animal, yet "All animals are equal, but some animals are more equal than others". So, animals are smart enough to have suicidal thoughts and feel love, but not enough to stop killing other animals for fun, not even for food? Rules for thee but not for me.

Now, without mocking vegans. Actually the reason why they hate farm animals is because there are a bunch of industrial farms with bad conditions for animals. And most lefists don't recognize difference between responsible farms.

Popularity

At this time cars were very popular in rich countries, and everyone was already brainwashed with sugar, giving their children the best they can(coke and sweets), and getting fat. Being super skinny became a fashion, and the ultimate health state normies can get, that is not being ultra fat. And conveniently, vegan diet was seen as "fit", low fat, low calorie, so it only gained more popularity for normies not interested in moral aspect.

On the other hand the moral part of vegans was supercharged by bambi(1942) being shown to children and showing that human bad, and apparently animals have families and love...

It has environmetalist an moral arguments, and sometimes alleged health related benefits. But all major problems that we have are man-made. Veganism is advertised as a cure for obesity and moral problems of industrial farming and lack of real hunting, but it was created by the same city slickers that can't bother with living outside of dystopia. But now that it was created, we should think about not killing a big part of nature(people) by removing these farms.

Vegans try to prove that their diet isn't inferior by using old methods of measuring nutrition, that also makes eggs and their cholesterol look unhealthy, and fat being worse than sugar. Dairy products are healthy and everyone knows that, but oh noooo they contain satoorated fats! Even if you don't drink milk like a real european, almost everything contains something derived from cow milk. If you can't breast feed, guess what.

Leftism and its short reach(has been a disaster for the human race)

If you think about it, it's kinda crazy because there many countries in which it is common to eat dogs and cats, or torture them and upload it to internet, but nobody cares.

But if you think longer, it makes sense. Leftists fight for liberties and "moral" changes only in western countries, where everything is established and conditions are better than anywhere else in the world.

Even better! Americans are arguing whether fetus feels pain, but ignore that abot 90% of white newborns and babies in US are tortured and humiliated to follow barbaric jewish traditions for aesthetic reasons. There are many cases where babies die as a result, lose the rest of their reproductive parts, can't have sex, need later surgeries to correct "accidents" or later these adults kill themselves.

1. Making any meaningful change goes out the window.

Veganism is equal to banning all forestry just because some brazilian rainforest was cut down to grow your AVOCADO, which is very popular among vegans and other leftists. Also, cargo ships run diesel engine with extra cheap fuel similar to tar.

2. Environment goes out the window.

Vegans introduced "meat" replacements, which are plants with chemicals(usually causing cancer) that taste like meat. In simple terms, it's analogy to child sex dolls specially offered as prevention for PDF files to avoid abusing actual child.

3. Morality goes out the window.

"Not being vegan is nazi"

My honest reaction:

Scene from Inglourious Basterds (2009)

Veganism is horrible for the environment.

  • You can't use many natural materials: leather, wool, hair, bones etc. Instead, there are replacements made out of plastic, in case of leather, additionally this plastic is toxic(PU).
  • It's impossible to ban using animal products and production of plastics at the same time.
  • You can't hunt. It causes animals to not fear humans, and in result: boars cause massive losses in property, wolves become more violent, bears associate humans with free food and attack much often. In result, they often get shot in defense(of property or physical safety), or have to be hunted by order anyway. In cucked(urban) areas, boars get caught in cages and shipped to rural forests.
  • CO2 production. Wild animals produce co2. Deer have more violent life in natural environment, when getting killed by wild predator.
  • You can't feed animals with leftovers, everything goes to trash and to landfill instead of soil generator 2000.

Veganism is horrible for you.

  • You can't function without using multiple supplements, the food lacks good proteins and has too much fiber.
  • You can't eat with friends or family without being an idiot, and can barely get any food outside of hipster restaurants and stores. Everything has a premium price tag anyway.

I was tricked into being "fit", which is disturbingly reminiscent, almost vegetarianism lite, because you still can't eat too much of random things because of the same old bribed soyentists and have similar bugman outcome as vegans, though not as bad.

At this point traditional chinese medicine is better than western in many aspects.

OBVIOUSLY i'm not a doctor and pls don't sue me. You should take various health methods into account and be reasonable.

Thanks for coming to my Ted talk. Further read at luke smith's When you spend years with vegan liberals, this is what happens to the man.

item.title: Voting by religion
item.description:
My religion says slavery is good.
My religion says birth control is bad.
My religion says sex without procreation is bad.
My religion says you should get married and practice monogamy.
My religion says gay sex is bad.
My religion says killing people is bad.
My religion says lying is bad.

My religion doesn’t say who to vote for.

Oh! There’s an blue dude that wants to enforce all these rules in law. He also had 3 wives and isn’t able to cite a favorite verse from my sacred book. I personally don’t even follow many of these rules, but i’m going to vote for him.

item.title: Zionism
item.description:
You don’t need to dive deep to see

2023 - soyjak focus switches from ukraine to poor israel.
Palestinians are not saints, but i have a quote from Joker(2019).
You get what you fucking deserve.

US military aid

The reason why Trump asked for mineral resources in ukraine in exchange for further military help, but gives much more money to israel with no exchange, is because israel is an investment. The investment doesn’t even have to return, but there is always hope that Ben Gurion canal will be built on a shorter route. The shorter route goes through gaza. You might say that this is not the reason why someone would want to continue genocide in gaza. But this is the best case assuming that this is just for money and strategic interest in middle east.
I’m very happy to see that USA doesn’t actually protect democracy but its own ass.
Why whould they want to build this? Well, egypt has closed down suez canal many times, and even restricked israel’s ships from using it because of arab-israeli conflict. It would also be a benefit for israel. I can see where israel benefits, but i don’t see why all american presidents would support it with tax money. You are robbed by zionists.

Hypocrisy

If this is not the case, then this is a hate crime much bigger than holocaust. This is also a possibility, because jews hate many nations, accuse americans of being slave owners while having disproportionately big share in middle passage, since they were among european immigrants to america, accuse poles of running the concentration camps and holocaust and call white nationalists antisemites as a weapon, call everyone else in middle east terrorists despite being the biggest terrorist state in the world.

Many jews that never experienced any violence make money off holocaust and nazism. This is called holocaust industry.

Israel is not open for immigration. Despite being built on immigration from europe and america, and having very big share in lobbying multiculturalism in europe. Zionism is a nationalist movement.

Some people tried to associate some muslim terrorist groups with WTC attack, but the only terrorist organization linked to WTC is mossad. Search for dancing israelis.

World leaders supporting israel

If you have pictures with more politicians, please send them to me, so we as a community can also show support.

109 Bars

If you get kicked out of 109 bars, is it the bars or your fault?

Jews were expelled from over 100 places in history, proving that they are unable to behave anywhere in the world.

The most were caused by single cases of ritual murder of non-jews.

Repeating history

We will have some kind of new ideology in the following years because as people are growing tired of this. Maybe there needs to be a 110th bar.
